products.title: First Burning Attraction
products.label: Alter
products.description: Damien Dubrovnik's 2013 Alter LP is a collaboration between Loke Rahbek and Christian Stadsgaard, moving from harsh black-metal intensity toward denser, more dimensional noise textures.
products.reviewQuote: richer, more refined approach to texture

products.title: Obzen
products.label: Nuclear Blast
products.description: Meshuggah's 2008 Nuclear Blast album obZen compresses technical precision, polyrhythmic weight and brooding reflection into one of the band's defining records.
products.reviewQuote: magic combination of its earlier freneticism

products.title: Into The Boiling Darks
products.label: Cav Empt
products.description: Rezzett's Into The Boiling Darks is a 2026 twenty-one-track set of warped, tactile electronic music from the London producer known for distressed rhythms and murky dance-floor pressure.

products.title: Noctourniquet
products.label: Warner Bros. Records / Sargent House
products.description: The Mars Volta's 2012 Noctourniquet pares the band's prog-rock excess into a tighter, electronic-tinged record of restless rhythms, fractured guitars and surreal vocals.

products.title: Blackstar
products.label: ISO Records / Columbia
products.description: David Bowie's 2016 Blackstar folds exploratory jazz, coded drama and alienation into a final act of reinvention, recorded with a New York jazz ensemble.
products.reviewQuote: exploratory jazz and the echoes of various mad men

products.title: Hesitation Marks
products.label: The Null Corporation / Columbia
products.description: Nine Inch Nails' 2013 Hesitation Marks is a skeletal, spare return to electronic tension, balancing jagged digital detail with Trent Reznor's industrial songwriting.
products.reviewQuote: most explicitly electronic album in years

products.title: Earthly Delights
products.label: Load Records
products.description: Lightning Bolt's 2009 Earthly Delights is a blast of Brian Chippendale's drums and vocals with Brian Gibson's bass, extending the duo's stripped-down attack into longer, louder forms.

products.title: The Talkies
products.label: Rough Trade Records
products.description: Girl Band's 2019 Rough Trade album The Talkies turns Dublin post-punk into a physical study in distortion, repetition, panic and ecstatic release.

products.title: The Early Years
products.label: Rough Trade Records
products.description: Gilla Band's The Early Years gathers the Dublin band's formative recordings, tracing the movement from noisy post-punk structures toward their later, more fractured industrial sound.
products.reviewSource: The Guardian (quoted from Gilla Band feature)

products.title: Chaosphere
products.label: Nuclear Blast
products.description: Meshuggah's 1998 Chaosphere is a landmark of extreme, rhythm-led metal, built from downtuned guitars, machine-like drumming and tightly interlocked polyrhythms.

products.title: Self Titled
products.label: Maverick
products.description: Team Sleep's 2005 self-titled album is Chino Moreno's atmospheric side project with Deftones collaborators and guests, using dream-pop, electronics and slow-burn guitar space.
products.reviewQuote: fit with the music very well

products.title: Come With Us
products.label: Freestyle Dust / Virgin
products.description: The Chemical Brothers' 2002 Come With Us pairs big-beat propulsion with strings, keyboards, congas and psychedelic studio detail on a sleek early-2000s dance record.

products.title: Further
products.label: Freestyle Dust / Parlophone
products.description: The Chemical Brothers' 2010 Further is a sequence of electronic songs designed as an audio-visual experience, balancing psychedelic repetition with the duo's club-scale impact.

products.title: It's Blitz!
products.label: Dress Up / Interscope
products.description: Yeah Yeah Yeahs' 2009 It's Blitz! recombines rock, synths and dance-floor instincts into a bracing, emotionally open third album.

products.title: Reloaded
products.label: Maverick / Warner Bros.
products.description: The Matrix Reloaded soundtrack is a 2003 compilation of industrial, nu-metal, dark dance and film-score music, connecting artists such as Marilyn Manson, Deftones and Rob Zombie to the sequel.
products.reviewQuote: industrial, aggro-nu-metal, and dark dance music

products.title: Pirouette
products.label: True Panther
products.description: Model/Actriz's 2025 Pirouette is a tense second album from the New York band, turning noise, dance-rock and club rhythm into songs about desire, power and exposure.

products.title: Marty Supreme
products.label: A24 Music
products.description: Daniel Lopatin's 2025 Marty Supreme score uses bright percussion, synth layers and restless momentum to mirror the film's competitive table-tennis world.

products.title: Sophie
products.label: Transgressive / Future Classic
products.description: Sophie's posthumous 2024 self-titled album was assembled by Benny Long from the artist's final recordings, keeping her bright pop abstraction and industrial edges in conversation.
products.reviewQuote: still sounds like the future of pop music

products.title: Things Falling Apart
products.label: Nothing Records / Interscope
products.description: Nine Inch Nails' 2000 Things Falling Apart is a remix companion to The Fragile, rebuilding its industrial songs through altered rhythms, harsher electronics and new production perspectives.

products.title: Tear From The red
products.label: Undying Music
products.description: Poison the Well's 2002 Tear From the Red captures the Florida band's transition from hardcore extremity toward a more melodic, emotionally expansive form of metalcore.

products.title: Reloaded
products.label: Maverick / Warner Bros.
products.description: The Matrix Reloaded soundtrack's cassette edition presents the same 2003 compilation of industrial, aggro-nu-metal, dark dance and score material assembled for the film's sequel.
products.reviewQuote: industrial, aggro-nu-metal, and dark dance music

products.title: The Fat Of The Land
products.label: XL Recordings
products.description: The Prodigy's 1997 The Fat of the Land is a global breakbeat landmark, combining punk abrasion, rave production and hard-edged vocal hooks into a chart-topping set.

products.title: Kammerkonzert
products.label: Warp Records
products.description: Squarepusher's 2026 Kammerkonzert places Thomas Jenkinson's drum programming and bass imagination inside a virtual chamber ensemble shaped by jazz and contemporary composition.
products.reviewQuote: flagrant showcase for his ear and skill

products.label: A-Zap
products.description: Melt-Banana's 2024 3+5 is a nine-track burst of Japanese hardcore and noise-rock, using electronic accents and abrupt shifts to keep the duo's attack in motion.

products.title: Endlessness
products.label: Warp Records
products.description: Nala Sinephro's 2024 Endlessness centers on evolving arpeggios, bringing harp, piano, modular synths and London's jazz community into one continuous field.

products.title: Senyawa with Kazuhisa Uchihashi
products.label: Innocent Records / Contra-Disc
products.description: Senyawa and Kazuhisa Uchihashi's 2012 collaboration joins Rully Shabara and Wukir Suryadi's vocal and percussive practice with the Japanese improviser's prepared and electric guitar.

products.title: Crimson Eyes
products.label: Orange Cliff Records
products.description: Sigmun's 2015 Crimson Eyes is the Indonesian quartet's debut, arranging slow-burning stoner and psychedelic rock around heavy riffs, dark surreal imagery and long-form dynamics.
products.reviewQuote: a proof of continuation, not a beginning

products.title: The Next Day
products.label: ISO Records / Columbia
products.description: David Bowie's 2013 The Next Day is a surprise return after a decade away, using hard-edged rock, art-pop echoes and self-reference without becoming a simple nostalgia record.
products.reviewQuote: a cunning act of sleight of hand

products.title: Antenna
products.label: RCA
products.description: Cave In's 2003 Antenna moves the Massachusetts band's experimental metal toward concise hooks and major-label scale while keeping its guitars intelligently warped.

products.title: Merriweather Post Pavilion
products.label: Domino
products.description: Animal Collective's 2009 Merriweather Post Pavilion refines the group's layered vocals, ecstatic electronics and organic percussion into an unusually immediate kind of psychedelic pop.

products.title: Isn't Anything
products.label: Creation Records
products.description: My Bloody Valentine's 1988 Isn't Anything is an early statement of the band's noise-pop language, balancing ear-splitting guitar texture with intimate melody and fragile vocals.

products.title: Knights of The Black Table
products.label: Avalanche Recordings / Daymare Recordings
products.description: JK Flesh and Goth-Trad's 2019 Knights of the Black Table is an industrial-bass collaboration where Justin Broadrick's metal pressure meets Goth-Trad's stripped, dub-informed electronics.

products.title: Criminal
products.label: Sacred Bones Records
products.description: The Soft Moon's 2018 Criminal is Luis Vasquez's stark industrial-rock record, turning isolation, mechanical rhythm and cold-wave atmosphere into a confessional late-period statement.

products.title: Interstellar Overtrove
products.label: P2
products.description: Behold... The Arctopus's 2023 Interstellar Overtrove is an instrumental experiment in avant-garde jazz, jazz fusion and technical metal, performed with electronic drums, Warr guitar and guitar synth.

products.title: Wish Defense
products.label: Trouble In Mind
products.description: FACS' 2025 Wish Defense is brooding post-punk with wiry guitars, hypnotic drums and dirty bass, and the final recording made by Steve Albini at Electrical Audio.

products.title: I Hear You
products.label: XL Recordings
products.description: Peggy Gou's 2024 I Hear You brings house foundations, disco gloss and pop-minded hooks together in a concise debut designed for both headphones and the dance floor.

products.title: Love Heart Cheat Code
products.label: Brainfeeder
products.description: Hiatus Kaiyote's 2024 Love Heart Cheat Code expands the Melbourne group's future-soul vocabulary with jazz harmony, elastic rhythm and Nai Palm's intimate vocal writing.

products.label: PAN
products.description: Arca's 2013 &&&&& is a continuous twenty-five-minute mixtape that mutates grime, trap, glitch and dub into a slippery, multi-layered vision of electronic music.

products.title: Buoys
products.label: Domino
products.description: Panda Bear's 2019 Buoys strips Noah Lennox's songwriting toward acoustic guitar, sparse digital production and voice, creating a direct and solitary Domino album.

products.title: Turn The Page
products.artist: Overmono & The Streets Turn The Page
products.label: XL Recordings
products.description: Overmono's 2024 XL rework of The Streets' Turn The Page translates the 2002 original into a glitchy, club-ready UK dance track and long-running live favorite.

products.title: Duori
products.label: Stroom
products.description: Heith and Tarawangsawelas' 2026 Duori documents a long-distance collaboration shaped by Sundanese ritual, jaipong club culture, low-fidelity exchange and electronic sound design.

products.title: SickElixir
products.label: XL Recordings
products.description: Blawan's 2025 SickElixir balances industrial abrasion with dance-floor pleasure, turning modular percussion, distorted voices and mutated techno into an unusually entrancing second album.

products.title: Self Titled
products.label: Keck
products.description: Giant Swan's self-titled debut is a 2019 Keck LP by Bristol duo Robin Stewart and Harry Wright, built from rugged electronics, improvised pressure and physical club energy.
products.reviewQuote: a statement that changes with each recipient
products.reviewSource: Turntable Lab, quoted from Giant Swan

products.title: Crewneck Sweatshirt
products.label: Motorith
products.description: Motorith crewneck sweatshirt from 2023 with front and sleeve artwork.

products.title: Flesh Knitsweater
products.label: NIXP Apparel
products.description: Flesh Knitsweater apparel item.

products.title: Index 01: Jakarta Independent Sound
products.label: NIXP Publishing
products.description: The first NIXP publishing index: interviews, photography, release notes, and shop fragments.

products.title: Tranquilizer
products.label: Warp Records
products.description: Oneohtrix Point Never's 2025 Tranquilizer turns unstable commercial sample archives into dense, transportive electronic music about impermanence.
products.reviewQuote: most immediately pleasurable Oneohtrix Point Never album

artists.name: Overmono & The Streets Turn The Page
